label: Ikorodu Plot — Disputed Title (boundary conflict)
encumbrance_detail: Active boundary dispute with neighbouring Plot 18 filed at Ikorodu Magistrate Court (Case No. IKR/MAG/2023/0047). Do not transact until resolved.
restrictions: court injunction — no development until case resolved

label: Epe Lagoon Plot — Government Acquisition Flag
acquisition_detail: This parcel falls within a Lagos State Government proposed shoreline regularisation zone (Gazette Notice LG/2022/041). Verify current acquisition status at Lagos State Surveyor-General's office before transacting.
restrictions: shoreline regularisation zone — confirm non-acquisition status

label: Port Harcourt Plot — Revoked Title
acquisition_detail: Title revoked by Rivers State Government under compulsory acquisition order for the East-West Road expansion project (Gazette RI/2021/018). Compensation proceedings ongoing.
encumbrance_detail: Government compulsory acquisition — title legally revoked. No private sale is permitted.
restrictions: government acquisition — no private development permitted
